release_notes: Pro umbrella v2: rounds out FormatPresets, SheetProtect, SmartCompare, SplitColumn, MergeSheets with one extra headline feature each.
changelog: FormatPresets: add Ledger Style — alternating-row light-grey backgrounds (pairs with existing Report Style)
SheetProtect: add Lock Formulas Only — protects sheet but only formula cells are read-only; data cells stay editable
SmartCompare: add Compare Two Sheets — diff active sheet vs another sheet by name; differing cells painted red
SplitColumn: add Split on Delimiter — custom delimiter via prompt (use \t for tab); CSV-quote-aware
MergeSheets: add Split Consolidated — inverse of Consolidate Sheets; splits a Source-keyed sheet back into per-source sheets
New IInputDialogService abstraction + WindowsInputDialogService backing impl
13 new execute-path tests + helper tests for the v2 features
